turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, my name is Tanvi Agarwal. I had a thyroid test done on Friday and the doctor said results would come in 48 hours but it's been 5 days now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry for the delay, Ms. Agarwal. That must be frustrating especially when you're waiting for results.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, very. I just want to know if they're ready.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Completely understandable. Unfortunately, I don't have direct access to the laboratory systems to check the status of individual reports from this line. I wouldn't want to give you a wrong update on something important. Let me transfer you to our lab team right away — they'll be able to tell you exactly where things stand.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Connecting you to our laboratory staff now. Thank you for your patience, Ms. Agarwal.
